images.label: blood_moon_rooftop
images.prompt: A lone figure in tattered black Taoist robes stands on a crumbling eave of a ruined observatory under a swollen blood-red moon; his left eye reflects shattered beams and ash, right eye reveals glowing gray filaments rising from cracked earth like ghostly roots; cyberpunk-meets-ancient-Chinese-fantasy style, high-detail digital painting, low-angle composition, dramatic chiaroscuro with crimson lunar light casting long jagged shadows and eerie greenish ambient glow from underground veins.

images.label: bronze_casket_cave
images.prompt: A close-up of an ancient bronze casket resting on frost-covered stone floor inside a narrow subterranean cave; the casket's surface shows bone-like textures and a grotesque 'Ming' character carved from embedded baby teeth; sci-fi horror aesthetic with bioluminescent decay, macro perspective, cold blue-green rim lighting from phosphorescent walls, deep shadow contrast, misty atmosphere, hyperrealistic texture detail on corroded metal and organic inclusions.

images.label: lotus_cloth_ritual
images.prompt: A kneeling figure in shadow places a white silk cloth embroidered with a half-bloomed snow lotus onto a pulsating bronze chest; faint luminous green script emerges on the fabric as viscous aqua fluid oozes from tooth-embedded glyphs; anime-style cinematic scene with vertical framing, volumetric fog, moody backlighting from above (simulating shaft of blood-moon light), delicate fabric physics, ethereal glow contrasting with oppressive gloom, intricate linework and atmospheric depth.
